faqs.question: How much does clothes moth control cost in Hackensack, NJ?
faqs.answer: Clothes moth control in Hackensack typically ranges from $550 to $5,000 depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and treatment method required. A standard residential treatment starts around $550, while larger homes or severe infestations requiring multiple treatments and ongoing monitoring can cost up to $5,000. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have a clothes moth infestation in my Hackensack home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include small holes in wool, silk, or cashmere clothing, thin or bare spots on rugs and upholstery, silken tubes or cases in closets, and small beige or gold-colored moths flying around your home (particularly near wardrobes). You may also notice larvae (small white caterpillars) or webbing in the corners of closets and drawers. If you notice any of these signs, contact us immediately for an inspection.

faqs.question: How long does clothes moth treatment take in Hackensack?
faqs.answer: Initial treatment typically takes 1-3 hours depending on the size of your property and extent of the infestation. Most infestations require 2-3 follow-up visits spaced 2-3 weeks apart to target newly hatched larvae and ensure complete elimination. Our technicians will create a customized timeline during your inspection and keep you informed throughout the process.

faqs.question: Are clothes moth treatments safe for my family and pets in Hackensack?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and integrated pest management techniques that are safe for your family and pets when applied correctly. We can also offer eco-friendly and low-toxicity treatment options for sensitive households. Our technicians will provide specific safety instructions, but generally, treated areas are safe to re-enter within 2-4 hours after application once surfaces are dry.
